## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../README.md#-contributing) guidelines
- [ ] My changes don't break existing functionality
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally or in Colab
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My commits follow the project style

## 📝 Description

Brief description of changes.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## 🧪 Testing

Describe how you tested these changes.
